evaluators.name: Chicago–Paris 4-day Cheapest Option to Shipment Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user created a Chicago→Paris quote for a 10 kg box, limited results to services delivering within 4 business days, selected the cheapest qualifying service, and created a shipment from that selection.

evaluators.name: Toronto–New York Economy Docs with Card Payment Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user set up a Toronto→New York document shipment with a ≤$40 USD price filter, chose an economy service within that limit, and successfully paid by credit/debit card.

evaluators.name: Madrid Friday Afternoon Pickup Earliest Slot Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user scheduled a pre-labeled pickup in Madrid 28001 on the upcoming Friday for four packages and chose the earliest available pickup slot starting at or after 14:00.

evaluators.name: LA–Tokyo Customs Estimate with Prepaid Duties Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user created a customs estimate for $250 of clothing from Los Angeles to Tokyo, chose a prepaid-duties option with duties ≤ $60, and saved that estimate.

evaluators.name: Berlin Drop-off Location Nearest and Saved Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user saved as a favorite the nearest Berlin 10117 drop-off location that accepts international shipments and is open until at least 20:00 on weekdays.

evaluators.name: In-transit Shipment Evening Reschedule (3rd Weekday) Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user rescheduled an in-transit shipment using its tracking number to the third available future weekday date and selected an evening 18:00–21:00 delivery slot, updating the shipment accordingly.

evaluators.name: Shanghai Business Sender to London Express Draft Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user has a draft express shipment from a business sender in Shanghai (200001, China) to an existing London business recipient, with a declared value of $500, full-value insurance, and no successful payment (draft only).

evaluators.name: Amsterdam–Sydney Low-CO2 Under-$100 Fastest Option Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user created a quote for a 2 kg box from Amsterdam 1012 AB to Sydney 2000, filtered services to CO₂ ≤ 15 kg and price ≤ $100, sorted by fastest delivery, and selected the fastest qualifying option.
